copilot.title: Co-pilot is off
copilot.subtitle: Turn it on to ask your data in plain English. The SQL stays visible and auditable.

anomalies.title: Anomaly detection is off
anomalies.subtitle: When you turn it on, Puntovivo watches each cashier's pattern against their own 30-day baseline and flags anything that drifts.

semanticSearch.title: Semantic search is off
semanticSearch.subtitle: Meaning-based product search: "low-fat dairy" finds the yogurt even when the SKU doesn't say light.

invoiceOcr.title: Invoice OCR is off
invoiceOcr.subtitle: Upload a photo of the invoice and the AI pre-fills the purchase. You review, it types.

disabled.role: Only an admin can turn AI on.

disclaimer.copilot: AI-generated answer — review the SQL before acting.
disclaimer.anomaly: Starting point for an investigation, not an accusation.

privacy.redaction: Personal data is redacted before it leaves your server.

audit.title: AI activity log
audit.subtitle: Most recent AI events executed in this tenant.
